title: Ocean Blender
description: Make Ocean World and TerraBlender work together
body:
If you installed [Ocean World Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ocean-world) and also wanted to play with more biomes to explore, you may find out that Ocean World Mod cannot work with TerraBlender together. So this mod is developed to solve this problem.
You shall install Ocean World, TerraBlender, other mods that add biomes to the game (eg. Emerald Craft), and this mod together. Then enjoy the game with endless ocean and more biomes!

After 1.19.3, Ocean World is no longer dependency of this mod - the related function is separated into a standalone mod called [Custom World Generation](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-world-generation), which is required by this mod.
